Class DatabaseHelper

java.lang.Object
databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
public class DatabaseHelper extends Object
The DatabaseHelper class is responsible for managing the connection to the database, performing operations such as user registration, login validation, and handling invitation codes.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    DatabaseHelper.ConversationSummary
    Inner class representing a conversation summary for inbox display.
    static class 
    DatabaseHelper.DirectMessage
    Inner class representing a direct message between two users.
    static class 
    DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage
    Represents a private message
    static class 
    DatabaseHelper.QuestionFilter
    Filters for future implementation

  • Method Details

    • connectToDatabase

      public void connectToDatabase() throws SQLException
      Method to connect to database
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • ensureConnected

      private void ensureConnected() throws SQLException
      Method to ensure connection to database.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • createTables

      private void createTables() throws SQLException
      Create user table and invitation code table.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateDatabaseSchema

      public void updateDatabaseSchema()
      Updates the database schema.

    • createQATables

      private void createQATables() throws SQLException
      Creates tables in database for questions, answers, private messages, answer feedback, reviews, and review replies.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • createDirectMessageTables

      private void createDirectMessageTables() throws SQLException
      Creates tables for direct messaging system.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • editReview

      public boolean editReview(int reviewId, String newReviewText) throws SQLException
      Updates the text of an existing review and overwrites the 'createdAt' column to reflect the time of the update (modification).
      Parameters:
      reviewId - The ID of the review to update.
      newReviewText - The new content for the review.
      Returns:
      true if the review was successfully updated, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getReviewById

      public application.Review getReviewById(int answerId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a single Review object from the database by its answer ID.
      Parameters:
      answerId - The primary key ID of the review to retrieve.
      Returns:
      The Review object, or null if not found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • addReviewReply

      public void addReviewReply(int reviewId, String userName, String replyText) throws SQLException
      Adds a reply to an existing review.
      Parameters:
      reviewId - The ID of the review being replied to.
      userName - The username of the replier.
      replyText - The content of the reply.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getRepliesForReview

      public List<application.ReviewReply> getRepliesForReview(int reviewId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a list of all ReviewReply objects associated with a given review ID.
      Parameters:
      reviewId - The ID of the review to retrieve replies for.
      Returns:
      A List of ReviewReply objects.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getAllReviews

      public List<application.Review> getAllReviews(String username) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a list of all Review objects, optionally filtered by username. If username is null or an empty string, all reviews are returned.
      Parameters:
      username - The username of the user whose reviews to retrieve (optional).
      Returns:
      A List of Review objects.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getReviewsByAnswerId

      public List<application.Review> getReviewsByAnswerId(int answerId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves a list of all Review objects associated with a given answer ID.
      Parameters:
      answerId - The ID of the answer to retrieve reviews for.
      Returns:
      A List of Review objects. The list will be empty if no reviews are found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • addReview

      public void addReview(int id, String userName, String reviewText) throws SQLException
      Adds a review to an answer.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the answer to add a review to.
      userName - Username of the reviewer.
      reviewText - Text content of the review.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • updateAnswerHasReview

      public void updateAnswerHasReview(Boolean tf, int answerId) throws SQLException
      Updates an answer to show if it has a review
      Parameters:
      tf - The value to update the reviewed status to.
      answerId - The ID of the answer to update.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getAnswerHasReview

      public boolean getAnswerHasReview(int answerId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves the status of the 'hasReview' flag for a specific answer.
      Parameters:
      answerId - The ID of the answer to check.
      Returns:
      true if the answer has been reviewed, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • deleteReviewById

      public void deleteReviewById(int reviewId) throws SQLException
      Deletes a review record from the database by its primary key ID. Due to FOREIGN KEY ON DELETE CASCADE, all associated review_replies are also deleted.
      Parameters:
      reviewId - The ID of the review to delete.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getReviewPointsTo

      public int getReviewPointsTo(int reviewId) throws SQLException
      Gets the answerId the review points to
      Parameters:
      reviewId - The ID of the review to check.
      Returns:
      the answer ID.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • getQuestionByAnswerId

      public application.Question getQuestionByAnswerId(int answerId) throws SQLException
      Retrieves the ID of the question associated with a specific answer ID.
      Parameters:
      answerId - The ID of the answer.
      Returns:
      The ID of the corresponding question, or -1 if not found.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database access error occurs.

    • isDatabaseEmpty

      public boolean isDatabaseEmpty() throws SQLException
      Check if the database is empty.
      Returns:
      True or False
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • register

      public void register(application.User user) throws SQLException
      Register new user into database user table.
      Parameters:
      user - User to add into database.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateUserEmail

      public boolean updateUserEmail(String username, String newEmail) throws SQLException
      Updates a user's email in the database.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to change the email for.
      newEmail - String to set the email to.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • login

      public boolean login(application.User user) throws SQLException
      Log user into the system.
      Parameters:
      user - User logging in.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • doesAdminExist

      public boolean doesAdminExist() throws SQLException
      Checks if an Admin exists in the database.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • doesUserExist

      public boolean doesUserExist(String userName)
      Checks whether a certain user exists.
      Parameters:
      userName - Username to check existence of.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.

    • getAllUsers

      public List<application.User> getAllUsers() throws SQLException
      Gets a list of all users in the database.
      Returns:
      List of Users
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getReviewers

      public List<application.User> getReviewers() throws SQLException
      Gets a list of Reviewers by their role (all but two)
      Returns:
      a list of users and their information
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateUserMiddleInitial

      public boolean updateUserMiddleInitial(String username, String newMiddleInitial) throws SQLException
      Updates the middle initial of a user in the database.
      Parameters:
      username - Username to set middleInitial for.
      newMiddleInitial - String to set middleInitial to.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUserRole

      public String getUserRole(String userName)
      Gets the role of a user in the database.
      Parameters:
      userName - Username to get the role of.
      Returns:
      Role value

    • getUserWeight

      public int getUserWeight(String userName)
      Gets the weight of a user in the database.
      Parameters:
      userName - Username to get the role of.
      Returns:
      Weight value (int)

    • deleteUser

      public boolean deleteUser(String username) throws SQLException
      Deletes a user from the database.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to delete.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUserCount

      public int getUserCount() throws SQLException
      Gets the number of users currently in the database.
      Returns:
      Number of users in database.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUserByUsername

      public Optional<application.User> getUserByUsername(String username) throws SQLException
      Gets user information by username.
      Parameters:
      username - Username to retrieve info for.
      Returns:
      User information.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUser

      public application.User getUser(String username) throws SQLException
      Gets a User object from the Database
      Parameters:
      username - The User to search for
      Returns:
      a user and their information
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUsers_Role

      public List<application.User> getUsers_Role(String role) throws SQLException
      Gets a list of users by their role
      Parameters:
      role - The role to search for
      Returns:
      a list of users and their information
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateUserPassword

      public boolean updateUserPassword(String username, String newPassword) throws SQLException
      Updates the password of a user in the database.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to update information for.
      newPassword - String to update the password to.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • setOtp

      public boolean setOtp(String username, String otp) throws SQLException
      Sets a one time password for a user without an expiration time.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to set the one time password for.
      otp - String of the one time password.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • setOtp

      public boolean setOtp(String username, String otp, int ttlMinutes) throws SQLException
      Sets a one time password for a user with an expiration time.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to set the one time password for.
      otp - String of the one time password.
      ttlMinutes - Time in minutes until the otp expires.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • isOtpValid

      public boolean isOtpValid(String username, String otp) throws SQLException
      Checks whether the one time password is valid.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user with an otp to check.
      otp - String of the one time password.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • consumeOtp

      public boolean consumeOtp(String username) throws SQLException
      Marks the one time password as used.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user with an otp to use.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • purgeExpiredOtps

      public int purgeExpiredOtps() throws SQLException
      Removes expired one time passwords from the database.
      Returns:
      The row count
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • resetUserPassword

      public boolean resetUserPassword(String username, String newPassword) throws SQLException
      Resets a user's password in the database.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to reset the password for.
      newPassword - String to update the password to.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateUserRole

      public boolean updateUserRole(String username, String newRole) throws SQLException
      Updates the role of a user in the database.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to update role for.
      newRole - String of role to update to.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • generateInvitationCode

      public String generateInvitationCode()
      Generates an invitation code
      Returns:
      Invitation code.

    • generateInvitationCode

      public String generateInvitationCode(int ttlMinutes)
      Generates an invitation code.
      Parameters:
      ttlMinutes - Time in minutes until invitation code expires.
      Returns:
      Invitation code.

    • validateInvitationCode

      public boolean validateInvitationCode(String code)
      Validates an invitation code.
      Parameters:
      code - String of the invitation code.
      Returns:
      True or False

    • purgeExpiredInvitationCodes

      public int purgeExpiredInvitationCodes() throws SQLException
      Removes expired invitation code from the database.
      Returns:
      The row count
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • markInvitationCodeAsUsed

      private void markInvitationCodeAsUsed(String code)
      Marks an invitation code as used.
      Parameters:
      code - String of the invitation code.

    • hasPendingRequest

      public boolean hasPendingRequest(String username) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • updateHasRequest

      public boolean updateHasRequest(String username, Boolean tf) throws SQLException
      Updates the value of hasRequest.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user.
      tf - Boolean value to update to.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUsersWithRequest

      public List<application.User> getUsersWithRequest() throws SQLException
      Gets a list of users who have a pending request.
      Returns:
      List of users where hasRequest is true.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • addAnswerFeedback

      public int addAnswerFeedback(application.AnswerFeedback feedback) throws SQLException
      Adds feedback/comment to an answer
      Parameters:
      feedback - AnswerFeedback object to add
      Returns:
      The generated feedback ID
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs

    • getFeedbackForAnswer

      public List<application.AnswerFeedback> getFeedbackForAnswer(int answerId) throws SQLException
      Gets all feedback for a specific answer
      Parameters:
      answerId - The answer ID
      Returns:
      List of feedback
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs

    • createQuestion

      public int createQuestion(application.Question question) throws SQLException
      Creates a new question in the database.
      Parameters:
      question - Question to add into database.
      Returns:
      Question Id
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getQuestionById

      public application.Question getQuestionById(int id) throws SQLException
      Gets a question by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - Question id of question to retrieve.
      Returns:
      Question
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getAllQuestions

      public List<application.Question> getAllQuestions(String username) throws SQLException
      Gets all questions by a specific user.
      Parameters:
      username - String of username of user to retrieve questions from.
      Returns:
      List of questions
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUnresolvedQuestions

      public List<application.Question> getUnresolvedQuestions() throws SQLException
      Gets a list of all unresolved questions in the database.
      Returns:
      List of questions.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • searchQuestions

      public List<application.Question> searchQuestions(String keyword) throws SQLException
      Gets a list of questions based on a keyword.
      Parameters:
      keyword - String to search for.
      Returns:
      List of questions
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateQuestion

      public boolean updateQuestion(application.Question question) throws SQLException
      Updates a questions information (Title, content, id, and askedBy).
      Parameters:
      question - Question to update information for.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • deleteQuestion

      public boolean deleteQuestion(int questionId, String username) throws SQLException
      Deletes a question from the database.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question to delete.
      username - Username of the user who asked the question.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • markQuestionResolved

      public boolean markQuestionResolved(int questionId, int answerId, String username) throws SQLException
      Marks a question as resolved.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question to mark as resolved.
      answerId - ID of the answer responsible for resolving the question.
      username - Username of the user who asked the question.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • createAnswer

      public int createAnswer(application.Answer answer) throws SQLException
      Creates a new answer in the database.
      Parameters:
      answer - Answer to add into database.
      Returns:
      Answer ID
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUnreadAnswersCount

      public int getUnreadAnswersCount(int questionId) throws SQLException
      Gets the number of unread answers for a particular question.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of question to check the number of unread answers for.
      Returns:
      Number of unread answers.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getAnswersByUser

      public List<application.Answer> getAnswersByUser(String user) throws SQLException
      Gets the list of answers for a user.
      Parameters:
      user - Username whose answers should be returned.
      Returns:
      List of answers written by that user.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getAnswersByRole

      public List<application.Answer> getAnswersByRole(String role) throws SQLException
      Gets the list of answers for users with a certain role.
      Parameters:
      role - Role whose answers should be returned.
      Returns:
      List of answers written by users with that role.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getAnswersForQuestion

      public List<application.Answer> getAnswersForQuestion(int questionId) throws SQLException
      Gets the list of answers for a particular question.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question to retrieve the answers for.
      Returns:
      List of answers
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • updateAnswer

      public boolean updateAnswer(application.Answer answer) throws SQLException
      Updates an answers information (Content, id, answeredBy).
      Parameters:
      answer - Answer to update information for.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • deleteAnswer

      public boolean deleteAnswer(int answerId, String username) throws SQLException
      Deletes an answer from the database.
      Parameters:
      answerId - ID of the answer to delete from the database.
      username - Username of the user who posted the answer.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • markAnswerAsRead

      public boolean markAnswerAsRead(int answerId) throws SQLException
      Marks an answer as read.
      Parameters:
      answerId - Id of the answer to mark as read.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • upvoteAnswer

      public boolean upvoteAnswer(int answerId, String username) throws SQLException
      Updates the upvotes for an answer.
      Parameters:
      answerId - ID of the answer to update.
      username - Username of the user who posted the answer.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • closeQuestion

      public boolean closeQuestion(int questionId, String username) throws SQLException
      Closes a question (marks as resolved).
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question to close.
      username - Username of the user who asked the question.
      Returns:
      True or False based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getQuestionsTopLevel

      public List<application.Question> getQuestionsTopLevel() throws SQLException
      Gets a list of questions where parentQuestionId is NULL (Top Level).
      Returns:
      List of questions
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getFollowupQuestions

      public List<application.Question> getFollowupQuestions(int parentQuestionId) throws SQLException
      Gets a list of questions that have a parent question (follow up questions).
      Parameters:
      parentQuestionId - ID of the parent question.
      Returns:
      List of questions
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • createFollowupQuestion

      public int createFollowupQuestion(int parentQuestionId, String title, String content, String askedBy) throws SQLException
      Creates a follow up question to another question (Child question to a parent question).
      Parameters:
      parentQuestionId - ID of the parent question.
      title - Title for the follow up question.
      content - Content of the follow up question.
      askedBy - Username of the user asking the question.
      Returns:
      Generated keys
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • addPrivateMessage

      public int addPrivateMessage(int questionId, String to, String from, String messageType, String content) throws SQLException
      Creates a private feedback message.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question the message is about.
      to - Username of the recipient.
      from - Username of the sender.
      messageType - Type of private message (e.g., "QUESTION" or "ANSWER").
      content - Content of the private message.
      Returns:
      The generated ID of the private message.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getPrivateMessagesForQuestion

      public List<DatabaseHelper.PrivateMessage> getPrivateMessagesForQuestion(int questionId) throws SQLException
      Gets a list of all private messages for a question.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question to get private messages for.
      Returns:
      List of private messages for that question.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • getUnreadPrivateCountForAsker

      public int getUnreadPrivateCountForAsker(int questionId, String askerUserName) throws SQLException
      Gets the number of unread private messages for the asker.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question to get unread count for.
      askerUserName - Username of the asker.
      Returns:
      Number of unread private messages.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • markPrivateMessagesReadByAsker

      public int markPrivateMessagesReadByAsker(int questionId, String askerUserName) throws SQLException
      Marks all unread private messages to the asker as read.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question to mark unread messages as read.
      askerUserName - Username of the asker.
      Returns:
      Row count
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • setFavorites

      public boolean setFavorites()
      Sets favorites
      Returns:
      false

    • getFavorites

      public String[] getFavorites(String username) throws SQLException
      Method to get a users favorited reviewers.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to get favorites for.
      Returns:
      String array of the users favorites.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • addFavorite

      public boolean addFavorite(String username, String favUsername) throws SQLException
      Method to add a reviewer to a users list of favorites.
      Parameters:
      username - Username of the user to add the favorite for.
      favUsername - Username of the user to add to favorites
      Returns:
      True or false based on function success.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If a database error occurs.

    • removeFavorite

      public boolean removeFavorite(String username, String favToRemove) throws SQLException
      Removes a username from the user's favorites list.
      Parameters:
      username - The user whose favorites to modify.
      favToRemove - The favorite username to remove.
      Returns:
      true if the row was updated or the favorite was already absent.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a database error occurs

    • sendDirectMessage

      public int sendDirectMessage(String fromUser, String toUser, String content) throws SQLException
      Sends a direct message between two users.
      Parameters:
      fromUser - Sender username
      toUser - Recipient username
      content - Message text
      Returns:
      Generated message ID
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • getConversation

      public List<DatabaseHelper.DirectMessage> getConversation(String currentUser, String otherUser) throws SQLException
      Gets all messages in a conversation between two users.
      Parameters:
      currentUser - Current user's username
      otherUser - Other user's username
      Returns:
      List of messages (oldest first)
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • getConversationList

      public List<DatabaseHelper.ConversationSummary> getConversationList(String username) throws SQLException
      Gets conversation list for user's inbox.
      Parameters:
      username - Current user's username
      Returns:
      List of conversation summaries (most recent first)
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • searchUsers

      public List<String> searchUsers(String searchTerm, String currentUser, String currentUserRole) throws SQLException
      Searches for users by username (for autocomplete). Filters by role-based messaging permissions.
      Parameters:
      searchTerm - Partial username to search
      currentUser - Current user's username
      currentUserRole - Current user's role
      Returns:
      List of matching usernames (max 10)
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • getTotalUnreadCount

      public int getTotalUnreadCount(String username) throws SQLException
      Gets total unread message count for a user.
      Parameters:
      username - User's username
      Returns:
      Total unread count
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • markConversationAsRead

      public int markConversationAsRead(String currentUser, String otherUser) throws SQLException
      Marks all messages in a conversation as read.
      Parameters:
      currentUser - Current user's username
      otherUser - Other user's username
      Returns:
      Number of messages marked as read
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • updateDirectMessage

      public boolean updateDirectMessage(int messageId, String newContent, String username) throws SQLException
      Updates a direct message's content. Only the sender can edit their own messages.
      Parameters:
      messageId - Message ID to update
      newContent - New message content
      username - Username requesting edit (must be sender)
      Returns:
      True if updated successfully
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • deleteDirectMessage

      public boolean deleteDirectMessage(int messageId, String username) throws SQLException
      Deletes a direct message. Only the sender can delete their own messages.
      Parameters:
      messageId - Message ID to delete
      username - Username requesting deletion (must be sender)
      Returns:
      True if deleted successfully
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • buildRoleFilter

      private String buildRoleFilter(String userRole)
      Builds SQL role filter for messaging permissions.
      Parameters:
      userRole - User's role
      Returns:
      SQL WHERE clause fragment

    • updateConversationSummary

      private void updateConversationSummary(String user1, String user2, String content) throws SQLException
      Updates conversation summary after sending a message. Internal helper method.
      Parameters:
      user1 - First user
      user2 - Second user
      content - Message content
      Throws:
      SQLException - If database error occurs

    • closeConnection

      public void closeConnection()
      Closes database connection

    • truncate

      public void truncate()
      Truncates the database
